task: API clients time out when fetching the full record list. Add pagination to RecordStore.list_records() so clients can fetch results in pages.
known_issue: The slice end is start + page_size - 1, so every page returns page_size - 1 records and the record at each page boundary is silently skipped: with page_size=50, records[49] appears on neither page 1 (indices 0-48) nor page 2 (indices 50-98).
expected_correct_fix: end = start + page_size (Python slices already exclude the end index).
